resources.string: Shows your upcoming Microsoft 365 / Outlook calendar appointments, adapting between the Fold\'s cover screen and its unfolded screen.
Tap to sign in with Microsoft

Sign in with the Microsoft account behind your Outlook / OneDrive calendar, then add the “Fold Calendar” widget to your home screen: long-press an empty spot → Widgets → Fold Calendar.\n\nOn the cover screen it shows your next appointment. Unfold your phone (or resize the widget wider) to see the full upcoming list.
